name: Minimum Window Substring
category: Sliding Window & Two Pointer Combined Problems
statement: Given two strings s and t. Find the smallest window substring of s that includes all characters in t (including duplicates) , in the window. Return the empty string "" if no such substring exists.
constraints:
• 1 <= n , m <= 105
  • n = s.length
  • m = t.length
  • string s and t consist of uppercase and lowercase letters.

examples.explanation: The minimum window substring of string s that contains the string t is "BANC".
The complete string is the minimum window
